html { overflow-y: scroll; height: 100%; background-color: #f1f1f1; } .flexbox { display: flex; overflow: hidden; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .flexbox .col { flex: 1; padding: 5px; text-align: center; height: 100%; } .textBox { height: 50px; width: 100%; padding: 5px 5px 5px 40px; border: 1px solid #ddd; box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 140%; background-position: 10px center; background-size: 20px; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-color: #f9f9f9; } #tUserName { box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 160% !important; padding: 5px 5px 5px 40px; height: 50px; width: 100%; background-position: 10px center; background-size: 20px; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-color: #f9f9f9; background-image: url(resources/images/icon_username.png); } #wResetPassword_C_tUserNameForReset { box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 160% !important; padding: 5px; height: 50px; width: 100%; } #tPassword { box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 160%; padding: 5px 5px 5px 40px; height: 50px; width: 100%; background-position: 10px center; background-size: 20px; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-color: #f9f9f9; margin-top: 10px; background-image: url(resources/images/icon_password.png); } #bLogin { padding: 0 !important; box-sizing: border-box; } input:-webkit-autofill, input:-webkit-autofill:hover, input:-webkit-autofill:focus { -webkit-padding-start: 8px !important; } #imageArea { background-attachment: fixed; background-position-x: right; background-position-y: bottom; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: 85% 100%; background-image: url(resources/images/_login_back_212.jpg); } #newsWrapper div span { background-color: transparent; transition: background-color 0.5s ease; } #newsWrapper:hover div span { background-color: #fff !important; cursor: pointer; } #passwordStrength { padding-left: 0 !important; margin-left: 0 !important; border: 1px solid rgb(229,229,229) !important; } .riStrengthBarL5 { background-color: green !important; color: #fff !important; } .riStrengthBarL4 { background-color: lightgreen !important; color: #000 !important; } .riStrengthBarL3 { background-color: orange !important; color: #000 !important; } .riStrengthBarL0, .riStrengthBarL1, .riStrengthBarL2 { background-color: red !important; color: #fff !important; }

$(function () { var dateCheck = new Date(); /* hour is before noon */ if (dateCheck.getHours() < 12) { $get('lWelcome').innerHTML = 'Good Morning'; } else if (dateCheck.getHours() >= 12 && dateCheck.getHours() <= 17) { $get('lWelcome').innerHTML = 'Good Afternoon'; } else if (dateCheck.getHours() > 17 && dateCheck.getHours() <= 24) { $get('lWelcome').innerHTML = 'Good Evening'; } $(document).keypress(function (e) { if (e.which == "13") { getLoginDetails(); $find('bLogin').click(); } }); }); function redirectToLogin() { location.href = 'login'; } function redirectAuth() { var url = decodeURIComponent(getQueryString('ReturnUrl', 'default')); location.href = url; } var newsFeed; var releaseInfo; var retrievingData = false; var loadingPanel; var maxRecords = 10; var lastRecordId; var newsData; var newsLoading; var releaseLoading; var toggleSpeed = 0; $(window).bind("load", function () { goTotop(); if (this != top) { top.location.reload(true); } newsFeed = $find('lNewsFeed'); releaseInfo = $find('lReleaseInfo'); newsLoading = $('#newsLoading'); releaseLoading = $('#releaseLoading'); getNews(true); getReleaseInfo(); randomJoke(); $('#jokeSetup').click(function () { $('#jokeType').toggle(); }); $('#jokeTag').click(function () { randomJoke(); }); }); function getReleaseInfo() { var releaseYear = $get('hMyRelease').value.split('.')[0]; var releaseNo = $get('hMyRelease').value.split('.')[1]; var d = $get('hMyLastPatchDate').value; d = parseInt(d); var lastPatchDate = new Date(parseInt($get('hMyLastPatchDate').value)); var daysSinceLastPatch = $get('hDaysSinceLastPatch').value; var url = $get('hMothershipPath').value + 'api/releasedata/' + releaseYear + '/' + releaseNo; //releaseLoading.slideToggle(toggleSpeed); $.ajax({ type: "GET", crossDomain: true, dataType: 'json', async: true, cache: false, contentType: "application/json", url: url, success: function (data) { var releaseData = { items: [] }; var icon, title, color, message; if (data.releasesBehind < 0) { title = 'Cutting Edge'; message = 'You are on a pre-release or development version'; icon = 'fa-user-astronaut'; color = '#000'; } else if (data.releasesBehind == 0) { title = 'Latest Version'; message = 'You are on the latest major version'; icon = 'fa-star'; color = '#000'; } else if (data.releasesBehind == 1) { title = 'Newer Version Available'; message = 'There is a newer version available'; icon = 'fa-sync'; color = '#000'; } else if (data.releasesBehind == 2) { title = 'You are Falling Behind'; message = 'You are now 2 full major releases behind'; icon = 'fa-exclamation-circle'; color = '#000'; } else { title = 'You are Behind'; message = 'You are ' + data.releasesBehind + ' major version(s) behind. Yikes!'; icon = 'fa-thumbs-down'; color = '#000'; } releaseData.items.push({ "icon": icon, "title": title, "message": message, "color": color }); //var myPatchDate = moment(lastPatchDate); //var currentPatchDate = moment(data.currentPatchDate); //.format('LL'); //var daysOutOfPatch = myPatchDate.diff(currentPatchDate, 'days'); //if (data.currentPatchDate == null) //{ // daysOutOfPatch = 0; //} //currentPatchDate = moment(data.currentPatchDate).format('LL'); if (daysSinceLastPatch < 2) { title = 'All Patches Loaded'; message = 'This system was last patched ' + (daysSinceLastPatch == 0 ? 'today' : 'yesterday') + '. Sweet.'; icon = 'fa-medal'; color = '#000'; } else if (daysSinceLastPatch < 8) { title = 'Patched within the Last Week'; message = 'This system was last patched ' + daysSinceLastPatch + ' days ago, on ' + moment(lastPatchDate).format('LL'); icon = 'fa-clock'; color = '#000'; } else if (daysSinceLastPatch < 30) { title = 'Patch ASAP'; message = 'This system was last patched ' + daysSinceLastPatch + ' days ago, on ' + moment(lastPatchDate).format('LL'); icon = 'fa-user-md'; color = '#000'; } else { title = 'PATCH ASAP'; message = 'This system was last patched ' + daysSinceLastPatch + ' days ago, on ' + moment(lastPatchDate).format('LL'); icon = 'fa-hospital'; color = '#000'; } releaseData.items.push({ "icon": icon, "title": title, "message": message, "color": color }); var testAccount = $get('hTestAccount').value; var testAccountCopyOf = $get('hTestAccountCopyOf').value; var testAccountCopyFrom = $get('hTestAccountCopyFrom').value; if (data.releasesBehind < 0) { title = 'DEVELOPER Account'; message = 'This is a pre-release or development account'; icon = 'fa-bug'; color = '#000'; } else if (testAccount == 'Y') { title = 'TEST Account'; message = 'This is a TEST account copy of ' + testAccountCopyOf; icon = 'fa-vial'; color = '#000'; } else { title = 'LIVE Account'; message = 'This is a LIVE account - Measure twice, cut once'; icon = 'fa-heartbeat'; color = '#000'; } releaseData.items.push({ "icon": icon, "title": title, "message": message, "color": color }); releaseLoading.slideToggle(toggleSpeed); releaseInfo.set_dataSource(releaseData.items); releaseInfo.dataBind(); }, error: function (xhr, status, error) { //alert(error); //var err = eval("(" + xhr.responseText + ")"); //alert(err.Message); } }); } function goTotop() { document.body.scrollTop = document.documentElement.scrollTop = 0; } function getLoginDetails(sender, args) { var now = new Date(); var now_utc = now.getFullYear() + '-' + pad(now.getMonth() + 1) + '-' + pad(now.getDate()) + 'T'; now_utc += pad(now.getHours()) + ':' + pad(now.getMinutes()) + ':' + pad(now.getSeconds()) + getOffset(); $get('hDateTime').value = now_utc; BrowserDetection.init(); $get('hBrowser').value = BrowserDetection.browser; $get('hBrowserVersion').value = BrowserDetection.browserVersion; $get('hOS').value = session.os + ' ' + session.osVersion; } function getOffset() { var date = new Date(); var sign = (date.getTimezoneOffset() > 0) ? "-" : "+"; var offset = Math.abs(date.getTimezoneOffset()); var hours = pad(Math.floor(offset / 60)); var minutes = pad(offset % 60); return sign + hours + ":" + minutes; } function pad(value) { return value < 10 ? '0' + value : value; } function checkSession() { if (localStorage.getItem('lastPageLoad') != null) { var sessionExpires = new Date(parseInt(localStorage.getItem('lastPageLoad'))); var now = new Date(); if (sessionExpires > now) { clearInterval(checkForActiveSession); getLoginDetails(); var ajaxManager = $find('RadAjaxManager1'); ajaxManager.ajaxRequestWithTarget('bAutoLogin', ''); } } } function setRememberMe(el) { var chkRememberMe = $get('chkRememberMe'); chkRememberMe.checked = !chkRememberMe.checked; } function resetPassword() { $find('wResetPassword_C_tUserNameForReset').set_value($find('tUserName').get_value()); $find('wResetPassword').show(); } function closePasswordReset() { $find('wResetPassword').close(); } function getNews(getNewData) { if (retrievingData == false) { retrievingData = true; //newsLoading.slideToggle(toggleSpeed); if (getNewData) { lastRecordId = ''; } else { } var release = $get('hMyRelease').value; var clientTla = $get('hClientTla').value; var moduleIds = $get('hModuleIDs').value; var url = $get('hMothershipPath').value + 'api/newsfeed/v2/?release=' + release + '&clientTla=' + clientTla + '&moduleIds=' + moduleIds; var appendData = lastRecordId != ''; $.ajax({ type: "GET", crossDomain: true, dataType: 'json', async: true, cache: false, contentType: "application/json", url: url, success: appendData ? addData : bindData, error: function (xhr, status, error) { //alert(error); //var err = eval("(" + xhr.responseText + ")"); //alert(err.Message); } }); } } function bindData(d) { newsData = d; if (newsData.length > 0) { lastRecordId = newsData[newsData.length - 1].id; } else { lastRecordId = ''; } newsLoading.slideToggle(toggleSpeed); newsFeed.set_dataSource(newsData); newsFeed.dataBind(); retrievingData = false; } function addData(d) { if (d.length > 0) { newsLoading.slideToggle(toggleSpeed); lastRecordId = d[d.length - 1].id; d = buildDisplay(d); for (var i = 0; i < d.length; i++) { newsData.push(d[i]); } newsFeed.appendData(d); } retrievingData = false; } function clickManager(url) { if (url != '') { window.open(url, '_blank'); } } function showReset(Sender, args) { $find('wReset').show(); } function checkPassword(sender, args) { var pw = $find('wReset_C_tNewPassword'); var pw2 = $find('wReset_C_tNewPassword2'); if (score >= 5) { //good } else { radalert( 'Sorry, your new password is not secure enough', null, null, 'Error', null); args.set_cancel(true); } } var score = 1; function validatePw(sender, args) { score = 1; if (args.get_passwordText().length >= $get('hPasswordLength').value) { score += 1; } if (args.get_passwordText().match(/(?=.*\d)/)) { score += 1; } if (args.get_passwordText().match(/(?=.*[a-z])/)) { score += 1; } if (args.get_passwordText().match(/(?=.*[A-Z])/)) { score += 1; } var msg = ''; if (score >= 5) { msg = "Perfect. This will work."; } else if (score == 4) { msg = "Almost good enough ..."; } else if (score == 3) { msg = "Nope, this won\\\ït work."; } else if (score <= 2) { msg = "Not good enough."; } args.set_indicatorText(msg); args.set_strengthScore(score * 20); $("#hPasswordStrength").val(score * 20); // Code Behind expects a score of 100 or more } var jokeTimeout; var lastJokes = []; function randomJoke() { clearTimeout(jokeTimeout); $('#jokePunchline').hide(); //$.ajax({ // url: 'fun/jokes/jokes_en.json', // type: 'GET', // dataType: 'json', // success: function (jokes) // { var jokes = jokes_en; var random_index = Math.floor(Math.random() * jokes.length); var random_joke = jokes[random_index]; var runawayBreaker = 0; while (lastJokes.indexOf(random_joke.id) != -1) { if (runawayBreaker > 100) break; random_index = Math.floor(Math.random() * jokes.length); random_joke = jokes[random_index]; runawayBreaker++; } if (lastJokes.length == 10) lastJokes.shift(); lastJokes.push(random_joke.id); $('#jokeType').html('[from <u>' + random_joke.type + '</u> humor]'); $('#jokeSetup').html(random_joke.setup); jokeTimeout = setTimeout(function () { $('#jokePunchline').html(random_joke.punchline); $('#jokePunchline').show('slow'); }, 3000); // }, // error: function (xhr) // { // console.log(xhr); // $('#divJoke').hide(); // }, //}); } function deliquentAccountWarning(message) { radalert(message, 500, null, 'Account Warning', redirectMe, null); } function redirectMe() { location.href = 'default'; }

children.text: /** * JavaScript Client Detection * (C) viazenetti GmbH (Christian Ludwig) */ (function (window) { { var unknown = '-'; // screen var screenSize = ''; if (screen.width) { width = (screen.width) ? screen.width : ''; height = (screen.height) ? screen.height : ''; screenSize += '' + width + " x " + height; } //browser var nVer = navigator.appVersion; var nAgt = navigator.userAgent; var browser = navigator.appName; var version = '' + parseFloat(navigator.appVersion); // mobile version var mobile = /Mobile|mini|Fennec|Android|iP(ad|od|hone)/.test(nVer); // system var os = unknown; var clientStrings = [ { s: 'Windows 10', r: /(Windows 10.0|Windows NT 10.0)/ }, { s: 'Windows 8.1', r: /(Windows 8.1|Windows NT 6.3)/ }, { s: 'Windows 8', r: /(Windows 8|Windows NT 6.2)/ }, { s: 'Windows 7', r: /(Windows 7|Windows NT 6.1)/ }, { s: 'Windows Vista', r: /Windows NT 6.0/ }, { s: 'Windows Server 2003', r: /Windows NT 5.2/ }, { s: 'Windows XP', r: /(Windows NT 5.1|Windows XP)/ }, { s: 'Windows 2000', r: /(Windows NT 5.0|Windows 2000)/ }, { s: 'Windows ME', r: /(Win 9x 4.90|Windows ME)/ }, { s: 'Windows 98', r: /(Windows 98|Win98)/ }, { s: 'Windows 95', r: /(Windows 95|Win95|Windows_95)/ }, { s: 'Windows NT 4.0', r: /(Windows NT 4.0|WinNT4.0|WinNT|Windows NT)/ }, { s: 'Windows CE', r: /Windows CE/ }, { s: 'Windows 3.11', r: /Win16/ }, { s: 'Android', r: /Android/ }, { s: 'Open BSD', r: /OpenBSD/ }, { s: 'Sun OS', r: /SunOS/ }, { s: 'Linux', r: /(Linux|X11)/ }, { s: 'iOS', r: /(iPhone|iPad|iPod)/ }, { s: 'Mac OS X', r: /Mac OS X/ }, { s: 'Mac OS', r: /(MacPPC|MacIntel|Mac_PowerPC|Macintosh)/ }, { s: 'QNX', r: /QNX/ }, { s: 'UNIX', r: /UNIX/ }, { s: 'BeOS', r: /BeOS/ }, { s: 'OS/2', r: /OS\/2/ }, { s: 'Search Bot', r: /(nuhk|Googlebot|Yammybot|Openbot|Slurp|MSNBot|Ask Jeeves\/Teoma|ia_archiver)/ } ]; for (var id in clientStrings) { var cs = clientStrings[id]; if (cs.r.test(nAgt)) { os = cs.s; break; } } var osVersion = unknown; if (/Windows/.test(os)) { osVersion = /Windows (.*)/.exec(os)[1]; os = 'Windows'; } switch (os) { case 'Mac OS X': try { osVersion = /Mac OS X (10[\.\_\d]+)/.exec(nAgt)[1]; } catch { osVersion = /Mac OS X (11[\.\_\d]+)/.exec(nAgt)[1]; } break; case 'Android': osVersion = /Android ([\.\_\d]+)/.exec(nAgt)[1]; break; case 'iOS': osVersion = /OS (\d+)_(\d+)_?(\d+)?/.exec(nVer); osVersion = osVersion[1] + '.' + osVersion[2] + '.' + (osVersion[3] | 0); break; } } window.session = { screen: screenSize, mobile: mobile, os: os, osVersion: osVersion, }; }(this));

function RadWindowprompt_detectenter(id, ev, input) { if (!ev) ev = window.event; if (ev.keyCode == 13) { var but = input.parentNode.parentNode.getElementsByTagName("A")[0]; if (but) { if (but.click) but.click(); else if (but.onclick) { but.focus(); var click = but.onclick; but.onclick = null; if (click) click.call(but); } } return false; } else return true; }
